title: Judge Hammer hitting sound effect
description: This texture pack changes the barrel opening sound to the judge hitting his hammer to control the court, you can change the thing that triggers it in the files.
body:
Based on this texture pack cause I couldnt figure the sound out :
[old-container-texture-pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-container-sounds)

This texture pack changes the barrel opening sound to how a judge hits his hammer to control the court, it was made to roleplay and joke around with friends if you build a court room and sue each other, it also changes the golden hoe to a judge's hammer, might change things later.
![How the golden hoe looks ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5a935e6b9a052105d7e88c2ccc73c4b9fd908d.png)
